column1: *Table 2.* Total carbon and nitrogen (% DW) and C/N ratio of leaf material of *Calamagrostis epigeios* grown under ambient and enhanced UV-B, before and after decomposing under ambient and enhanced UV-B in the dune grassland (autumn 1995). Average values of eight replications and standard error of the mean , are shown together with significances due to litter quality, decomposition and photodegradation. * = p < 0.05; *** = p < 0.01; *** = p < 0.001; n.s. = not significant
